data.title: BTC dominance Rising, Cool CPI boosts Markets, Coinbase delists memes
data.description:
Crypto rally post CPI fails to hold. BTC dominance hits 4-year high. ETH/BTC hits 5 year low. ETH drops out of top 20 revenue protocols. Stablecoin market cap surpasses ETH market cap. SEC delays options on Fidelity ETH ETF. Fed classifies BTC as a ‘hard reserve asset’. UAE sovereign fund invests $2bn in Binance. Ripple gets first payments license in Dubai. Ripple-SEC settlement may include...
source: https://decrypt.co/videos/interviews/3vxrU7Sk/btc-dominance-rising-cool-cpi-boosts-markets-coinbase-delists-memes

data.title: JPMorgan says public bitcoin miners to keep gaining share in BTC network hashrate
data.description:
The continued growth of publicly listed bitcoin miners is expected as they push further into vertical integration, JPMorgan analysts said.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/346193/jpmorgan-public-bitcoin-miners-btc-network-hashrate?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Starknet Users Can Now Pay with STRK on Bitcoin Lightning Network
data.description:
TL;DR Starknet users can now pay at merchants accepting Bitcoin Lightning payments using only STRK, thanks to Braavos wallet and the Atomiq bridge.  No need to set up a Lightning wallet or pre-fund with BTC, making Bitcoin payments simpler and increasing adoption.  This integration strengthens Starknet’s vision as an execution layer for Bitcoin and Ethereum, ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/starknet-users-can-now-pay-with-strk-on-bitcoin-lightning-network/

data.title:
$ETH After holding the same support for the past 1-2 years, it finally broke through which caused a move below $2K for the first time since late 2023.

It traded back down to the breakout level back in October 2023 which held as support for now.

The key level remains $2K-$2.1K…
MoonPay Buys Stablecoin Infrastructure Startup Iron to Expand Enterprise Payment Solutions
data.description:
The deal is reportedly worth at least $100 million and is part of MoonPay’s strategy to provide enterprises with fast, cost-effective, borderless stablecoin transactions.
The post MoonPay Buys Stablecoin Infrastructure Startup Iron to Expand Enterprise Payment Solutions appeared first on NFTgators .
source: https://www.nftgators.com/moonpay-buys-stablecoin-infrastructure-startup-iron-to-expand-enterprise-payment-solutions/

data.title: U.S. Senate Banking Committee votes to approve bill to regulate stablecoin issuers
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Senate Banking Committee passed a bill to regulate stablecoin issuers by a vote of 18 to 6, which is also the first step to submit the bill to Trump to sign into law. 
With the first committee approval, this bill, which will regulate U.S. stablecoin issuers at the federal level, now needs to be passed by the Senate as a whole, and the House of Representatives also has a similar version waiting for approval. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Memecoins Account for Half of New Listings in February, Exchange Data Show
data.description:
The post Memecoins Account for Half of New Listings in February, Exchange Data Show appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
Cryptocurrency exchange MEXC has released a report on new listings for January and February 2025, revealing that almost 50% of all tokens listed were memecoins. Despite the market volatility, interest in tokens associated with popular personalities and social trends...
source: https://coinpedia.org/information/memecoins-account-for-half-of-new-listings-in-february-exchange-data-show/

data.title: Senate Banking Committee votes to advance stablecoin bill, collecting support from both Democrats and Republicans
data.description:
The Senate Banking Committee voted to advance a monumental stablecoin bill, advancing it to the full Senate.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/346143/senate-banking-committee-votes-to-advance-stablecoin-bill-collecting-support-from-both-democrats-and-republicans?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Arkham: US Government Flags Address to Transfer $5,500 Worth of AVAX Tokens to New Wallet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Arkham posted on the X platform that the US government marked the address and just transferred funds, transferring $5,500 worth of AVAX tokens to a new wallet.

data.title: U.S. Government Transfers AVAX Tokens to New Wallet
data.description: According to Odaily, Arkham reported on the X platform that the U.S. government has recently moved funds, transferring AVAX tokens valued at $5,500 to a new wallet.
